summary: Tested complete backend localization for multilingual system (IT, EN, DE, PL). All 22 backend tests passed. Frontend language switcher verified - UI correctly displays translated content from backend in all 4 languages. Fixed bug in /api/support-resistance endpoint that was passing incorrect lang parameter.
passed_tests: Default language (no lang param) returns Italian
Invalid language param falls back to Italian
Frontend language switcher shows all 4 options (English, Italiano, Deutsch, Polski)
Frontend correctly switches to English and displays EN backend data
Frontend correctly switches to German and displays DE backend data
Frontend correctly switches to Polish and displays PL backend data
Frontend correctly switches back to Italian

bugs_fixed.issue: calculate_support_resistance_enhanced() was being called with 4 args (including lang) but only accepts 2-3 args
bugs_fixed.fix: Removed lang parameter from function call since the function doesn't support localization yet
bugs_fixed.rca: When adding lang parameter to get_support_resistance endpoint, the function call was updated to include lang but the underlying calculate_support_resistance_enhanced function wasn't updated to accept it

critical_code_review_comments: calculate_support_resistance_enhanced() has hardcoded Italian text for explanations - could be localized in future
Backend BACKEND_TRANSLATIONS dictionary at line 377 contains comprehensive translations for all 4 languages
get_translation() helper function at line 988 properly handles fallback to Italian for unknown keys

success_rate.frontend: 100% (language switcher and backend data integration working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Multilingual localization fully tested. All 4 languages (IT, EN, DE, PL) working for both frontend UI and backend API responses. Key endpoints with localization: /api/trade-signal, /api/open-interest, /api/funding-rate, /api/market/bias. The support-resistance explanations remain hardcoded in Italian (potential future enhancement). Frontend language selector uses data-testid='language-select' and saves preference to localStorage.

backend_translations.trade_signal: reasoning field translated in all 4 languages
backend_translations.open_interest: signal field translated in all 4 languages
backend_translations.funding_rate: signal_text field translated in all 4 languages
backend_translations.market_bias: analysis_text field translated in all 4 languages
